entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant species including landraces and cultivars used for crop improvement

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of a cultivated plant

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties that have been produced artificially for specific traits

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of a crop to improve its characteristics

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural yield produced

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The living genetic resources such as seeds or tissues of plants

entities.name: GENEBANKS
entities.description: Facilities used to store and preserve genetic material

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop

entities.description: A drought-tolerant cereal crop

entities.description: A legume crop

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An oilseed legume crop

entities.name: SMALL MILLETS
entities.description: A group of small-seeded cereal crops

entities.name: RAJENDRA S PARODA GENEBANK
entities.description: The specific genebank facility at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT-PATANCHERU
entities.description: The headquarters of ICRISAT located in Patancheru

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where ICRISAT-Patancheru is located

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that meet current needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of renewing germplasm stocks

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of describing the traits of germplasm

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The process of preserving genetic resources

entities.name: DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The process of providing germplasm to researchers

entities.name: DIVERSITY ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The evaluation of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection

entities.name: MINI-CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A further reduced representative subset of a core collection

entities.name: COMPOSITE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A collection combining various genetic resources

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to identify genetic traits

entities.name: COOL AND DRY CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental parameters required for seed conservation
